evidence_refs: DeepSeek final closeout compact evidence review

scope.diff_summary: Ignored the local .playwright-cli/ directory, documented Playwright CLI and browser verification diagnostics as local git-ignored artifacts, and added a regression test that creates a .playwright-cli console log and asserts it does not appear in git status.
gates_reviewed: node tools/run-with-node18.mjs --test test/playwright-cli-artifact-cleanliness.test.js test/known-risk-ledger.test.js test/frontend-acceptance.test.js passed with 49/49 tests.
git check-ignore .playwright-cli/console-check.log returned the sample log path.
git status --short -- .playwright-cli produced no output after generating a sample console log.
npm run check:known-risk-closeout passed with risk_count 7, open_count 1, terminal_count 6.
npm run check:known-risk-closeout:required failed only for the remaining scoped-out useProjection request ordering risk.
npm run test:coverage passed with 952/952 tests, all-files line coverage 91.91%, and all-files function coverage 96.93%.
npm run check:closeout passed after installing worktree-local root dependencies for the Playwright-backed public browser route check.
DeepSeek final closeout compact evidence review returned pass with no blocking or non-blocking findings.

notes: A broad read-only DeepSeek implementation review timed out, so implementation and closeout reviews were retried with compact no-tools evidence packets. Both compact reviews returned pass with no blocking or non-blocking findings.
